required_before_execution: Blender-generated camera/depth/lineart controls exist and are ready.
ComfyUI server is reachable at http://127.0.0.1:8188.
Install or expose at least one usable checkpoint in ComfyUI models/checkpoints.
Install ControlNet depth/lineart models if depth and lineart controls must be connected as ControlNet inputs.
Candidate outputs must not overwrite canonical source reference frames.
